name: jaddress-web-application
description: J-address monorepo - Japanese mail forwarding service

scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:docker && concurrently "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:docker: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const result = spawnSync('docker', ['info'], { stdio: 'ignore' }); if (result.status !== 0) { console.error('[dev] Docker daemon is not running or not reachable. Please start Docker and ensure docker-compose.yml exists before running \'pnpm run dev\'.'); process.exit(1); }" && docker compose up -d
